title: Ski battle droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Easteregg}}

[[File:Ski_battle_droid.jpg|thumb|right|A ski battle droid on [[Mount Merakan]].]]

The '''ski battle droid''', or simply '''ski droid''', was a form of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] produced by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to be used in arctic environments. It was designed to zip down mountains in order to incapacitate enemies with uncontrollable laughter. Only one such [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was ever seen in active duty, where it was seen sliding down the hill from [[Mount Merakan]] by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''
